label: Default tone dinner transition
text: Please come down and wash your hands. It's dinner time.
sourceTranslation: Dinner is almost ready. The sink is open for hands.
reviewFocus: Stays grounded in the same moment
Warm changes do not become sweeter or more parent-centered
Shorter and playful versions still feel natural

label: Straightforward school transition
text: Get your backpack and get your shoes on so we can get ready for school
sourceTranslation: Shoes and backpack are both part of getting out the door for school.
reviewFocus: More straightforward does not become bossy
Shorter versions keep both tasks
Playful remains restrained

label: Humorous bedtime cleanup
text: Please put your pajamas on and bring your book to bed.
sourceTranslation: Pajamas and a book seem to have made tonight's bedtime guest list.
reviewFocus: Playful refinement does not tip into gimmick
Straightforward refinement stays in tone family
Coverage of both tasks remains intact

label: Equalizing multi-part bedtime
text: Please come to the bathroom, get your pajamas on, and bring your book to bed.
sourceTranslation: The bathroom, pajamas, and book all seem to be looking for a good bedtime order.
reviewFocus: Equalizing stays natural and not performative
Multi-part coverage remains complete
Longer and warmer versions stay low-pressure

label: Interest-based bedtime with dinosaur
text: Please come to the bathroom, brush your teeth, and bring your dinosaur to bed.
sourceTranslation: The bathroom is the next dinosaur stop, and bedtime still has room for teeth plus a dinosaur companion.
reviewFocus: Interest stays grounded and not gimmicky
All parts remain present
Warm and playful variants keep the dinosaur connection light

label: Fewer Words lunch transition
text: Wash your hands and come to the kitchen for lunch.
sourceTranslation: Hands first, then the kitchen for lunch.
reviewFocus: Longer becomes a true expansion option
Compact tone still sounds human
No task loss

label: Multi-part cleanup and transition
text: Please put your plate in the sink, wipe your hands, and come sit on the couch with me.
sourceTranslation: The sink, clean hands, and the couch are all part of where this moment is headed.
reviewFocus: Three-part requests remain complete
Shorter does not collapse into abstraction
Warmer does not add pressure
